name: rx-spinner
title: Spinner (React)
description: Indeterminate loading indicator - rotating Loader2 glyph in three sizes (sm, default, lg). Use when duration is unknown; use Progress when percent complete is known. Mirrors ng-spinner from the Angular edition.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use rx-spinner.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
